records.question: Which stations named East Croydon have exactly 6.341 annual interchanges, exactly 20.551 annual entry and exit, no more than 6 platforms, and whose main services are Brighton Main Line?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.station_id = train_station.station_id
WHERE station.name = 'East Croydon' AND station.annual_interchanges = 6.341 AND station.annual_entry_exit = 20.551 AND station.number_of_platforms <= 6 AND station.main_services = 'Brighton Main Line'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Station_ID FROM station WHERE Name = 'East Croydon' AND Annual_interchanges = 6.341 AND Annual_entry_exit = 20.551 AND Number_of_Platforms <= 6 AND Main_Services = 'Brighton Main Line'

JOIN train_station ON station.station_id = train_station.station_id
WHERE station.main_services = 'South Western Main Line West of England Main Line' AND station.name = 'London Waterloo'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT s.Station_ID
FROM station s
JOIN train_station ts ON s.Station_ID = ts.Station_ID
JOIN train t ON ts.Train_ID = t.Train_ID
WHERE s.Name = 'London Waterloo'
GROUP BY s.Station_ID
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.Service) = 2
    AND SUM(CASE WHEN t.Service IN ('South Western Main Line', 'West of England Main Line') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 2

records.question: Which stations connected to trains have annual entry and exit numbers of at most 94.046?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.station_id = train_station.station_id
WHERE station.annual_entry_exit <= 94.046
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT station.Station_ID
FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.Station_ID = train_station.Station_ID
WHERE station.Annual_entry_exit <= 94.046

records.question: Which stations have at least 15 platforms, exactly 22.996 annual entry and exit, exactly 26.672 total passengers, and where main_services is Midland Main Line Thameslink High-Speed 1 Eurostar?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
WHERE station.number_of_platforms >= 15 AND station.annual_entry_exit = 22.996 AND station.total_passengers = 26.672 AND station.main_services = 'Midland Main Line Thameslink High-Speed 1 Eurostar'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Station_ID FROM station WHERE Number_of_Platforms >= 15 AND Annual_entry_exit = 22.996 AND Total_Passengers = 26.672 AND Main_Services = 'Midland Main Line Thameslink High-Speed 1 Eurostar'

records.question: Which stations named London Waterloo are located in London, have exactly 19 platforms, main services on South Western Main Line West of England Main Line, annual entry and exit exactly 94.046, annual interchanges exactly 9.489, and total passengers at most 103.534?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.station_id = train_station.station_id
WHERE station.total_passengers <= 103.534 AND station.number_of_platforms = 19 AND station.main_services = 'South Western Main Line West of England Main Line' AND station.location = 'London' AND station.annual_interchanges = 9.489 AND station.name = 'London Waterloo' AND station.annual_entry_exit = 94.046
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Station_ID
FROM station
WHERE Name = 'London Waterloo'
  AND Location = 'London'
  AND Number_of_Platforms = 19
  AND Main_Services = 'South Western Main Line West of England Main Line'
  AND Annual_entry_exit = 94.046
  AND Annual_interchanges = 9.489
  AND Total_Passengers <= 103.534

records.question: Which stations located in London have exactly 8.742 annual interchanges and at least 12 platforms?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.station_id = train_station.station_id
WHERE station.location = 'London' AND station.annual_interchanges = 8.742 AND station.number_of_platforms >= 12
records.pred_sql: SELECT Station_ID FROM station WHERE Location = 'London' AND Annual_interchanges = 8.742 AND Number_of_Platforms >= 12

records.question: Which stations on the West Coast Main Line serve the Island Express at exactly 11:15, have at least 3.832 annual interchanges, at least 40.44 total passengers, and no more than 18 platforms?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.station_id = train_station.station_id
JOIN train ON train_station.train_id = train.train_id
WHERE train.name = 'Island Express' AND station.main_services = 'West Coast Main Line' AND train.time = '11:15' AND station.annual_interchanges >= 3.832 AND station.total_passengers >= 40.44 AND station.number_of_platforms <= 18
records.pred_sql:
SELECT s.Station_ID
FROM station s
JOIN train_station ts ON s.Station_ID = ts.Station_ID
JOIN train t ON ts.Train_ID = t.Train_ID
WHERE s.Main_Services = 'West Coast Main Line'
  AND t.Name = 'Island Express'
  AND t.Time = '11:15'
  AND s.Annual_interchanges >= 3.832
  AND s.Total_Passengers >= 40.44
  AND s.Number_of_Platforms <= 18

records.question: Which stations named London Waterloo located in London have annual entry and exit of at most 94.046, total passengers no more than 103.534, and main services exactly South Western Main Line West of England Main Line?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
WHERE station.annual_entry_exit <= 94.046 AND station.name = 'London Waterloo' AND station.location = 'London' AND station.total_passengers <= 103.534 AND station.main_services = 'South Western Main Line West of England Main Line'
